blockingIssues.description: Missing required API fields return FastAPI default 422 responses, but feature contract expects HTTP 400 for invalid input/missing required fields.
POST /api/export/{cutlist_id} does not validate fps; invalid values (for example 0) can raise exporter errors and return HTTP 500 instead of HTTP 400.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refine .factory/skills/web-worker/SKILL.md to allow frontend-only features to skip mandatory API-test-first and agent-browser steps when no backend behavior changed, while still requiring explicit justification in handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both web-backend and web-frontend reviews observed divergence between rigid web-worker requirements and actual successful work patterns. Frontend feature web-frontend passed review without API test additions, yet handoff marked followedProcedure true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify expected HTTP semantics for request validation errors (400 vs framework-default 422) in mission guidance to prevent contract/test drift.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: web-backend expectedBehavior requires 400 for invalid input, but tests and implementation currently assert FastAPI 422 for missing required fields.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate note that web-worker skill is overly rigid for frontend-only work.
